## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Manna Stone Holdings and GrowthX for content creation and SEO strategies across multiple brands.](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Charles is interested in leveraging GrowthX's services for two distinct strategies: equestrian management software and interior design in Chicago](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [GrowthX's core offering starts at $9K/month for editorial (8 blogs/week) and $12K/month for programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Potential for a customized package to accommodate multiple brands/strategies, though this would be an edge case for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Charles sees potential for GrowthX to serve multiple holding companies in the growing software acquisition space](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes a series of AI-powered workflows for research, content generation, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Combines multiple AI systems (e.g., GPT-4, Perplexity, Claude) for different strengths in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Emphasizes human oversight and expertise throughout the process for quality and authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### SEO Strategy and Effectiveness

  - [GrowthX focuses on both editorial content and programmatic SEO for demand capture](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Recent success with Tiro (dental marketplace): 0 to 80-100 daily clicks in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Adapts to changing search landscape, including AI-powered search engines like Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Potential Collaboration Structure

  - [Charles proposes splitting content creation across two brands (4 blogs/week each)](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2812.0)
  - [GrowthX typically starts with one brand/strategy to validate before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2805.0)
  - [Potential for customized package to accommodate multiple brands, pending internal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)

### Holding Company Strategy

  - [Charles is building a software holding company, acquiring businesses across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [Sees potential for GrowthX to serve multiple holding companies in this growing investment trend](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)
  - [Drawing parallels to GrowthX's past experience with Danaher brands](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to discuss potential custom package options with Marcel (CEO) upon return from vacation](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed examples of potential content strategies for Charles' specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2972.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of finding content managers with expertise in both equestrian management and interior design](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=2994.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled to discuss tailored offerings and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/ktF64yELyZeavBHhzSVQb7R6dDgE4zFX?tab=summary&timestamp=3157.0)
